title: Cobblemon Randomizer
description: Randomize your cobblemon runs with various different random configurations!
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Randomizer A randomizer addon for Cobblemon that lets you start a randomized run with configurable options, intended to add replayability and variance in different runs. ### Features: - Random Starters - With gen selection - Random Wild Species - Wild Pokémon transform into a random species when caught - Random Wild Types - Pokémon spawns types are randomized (Recommended to use [Battle Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-battle-extras) to see randomized wild pokemon types) - Random Wild Abilities - Pokémon spawns abilities are randomized - Random Held Items - Pokémon spawn with random held items - Random Wild Movepools - Uses custom randomized learnset(Guarantees evolution moves) - Random Wild Spawns - All Pokémon can spawn at all locations - Random Evolutions - Pokémon evolve into random species ### Commands: /randomizer config /randomizer reset /randomizer status /givepokemonr [level] [ability] [type1] [type2] [custom] /pokespawnr [level] [ability] [type1] [type2] [helditem] [no_ai] /pokespawnatr [level] [ability] [type1] [type2] [helditem] [no_ai] /randomize [slot] [species] [ability] [types] ### Requirements: [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 1.7+ [Cobblemon Party Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-party-extras)
